# MLBoostedTreeClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.none

**Case**

Do not set validation data.

## Declaration

```swift
case none
```

## Specifying validation data

- **MLBoostedTreeClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.split(strategy:)**: Generate validation data by splitting the training dataset. This is the default.
- **MLBoostedTreeClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.table(_:)**: Set validation data from the MLDataTable provided.
- **MLBoostedTreeClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.dataFrame(_:)**: Validation data provided in a DataFrame.

items.description: Generate validation data by splitting the training dataset. This is the default.
